name: eslint-watchdog
description: Automatically restarts the ESLint language server when it crashes (e.g., OOM) and proactively restarts it on a timer to prevent crashes.

eslintWatchdog.autoRestart.markdownDescription:
Automatically restart ESLint when a crash is detected.

When **enabled**, the watchdog silently restarts ESLint and shows a toast notification.

When **disabled**, a notification appears with a **Restart ESLint** button so you can decide.

eslintWatchdog.proactiveRestartMinutes.markdownDescription:
Proactively restart ESLint every **N minutes** during idle periods to prevent memory from building up and causing an OOM crash.

Restarts only happen when you haven't typed for `#eslintWatchdog.idleSeconds#` seconds.

Set to `0` to disable proactive restarts entirely.

eslintWatchdog.staleThresholdMinutes.markdownDescription:
How many **minutes** of zero ESLint diagnostics (while JS/TS files are open) before the watchdog considers ESLint crashed.

Increase this if you get false crash detections on projects with few or no lint errors.

eslintWatchdog.cooldownMinutes.markdownDescription:
Minimum **minutes** between automatic restarts.

Prevents restart loops if ESLint keeps crashing immediately after restarting.

eslintWatchdog.idleSeconds.markdownDescription:
How many **seconds** of no typing before a proactive restart is allowed.

Ensures you're never interrupted mid-keystroke by a scheduled restart.

eslintWatchdog.showNotifications.markdownDescription:
Show toast notifications when ESLint is automatically restarted.

Disable for completely silent operation — you can still check the **Output > ESLint Watchdog** log.
